name: 血猎手套（★） | 焦炭
descriptionEn: These fingerless gloves have been decorated with metal studs and the Operation Bloodhound logo. It was crafted out of classic black supple leather. Challenge coins are great, but they don't draw blood when you backfist someone - Carmen Cocinero, Extraction Expert
descriptionZh: 这副露指手套使用金属铆钉和“血猎大行动”的图标进行了装饰。 这副手套是用经典的黑色柔软皮革手工制作出来的。 挑战币是很棒，但它们可不会在你用拳背猛击别人时让对方流血 - 营救专家卡门.库西内罗
